caption: A news broadcast displays a group of men seated at a long table in a conference room, with a large white backdrop behind them featuring the word "INDIA" in bold black letters. The men are dressed in formal attire, mostly white shirts or traditional Indian wear. Several small inset portraits of men appear on the left and right sides of the screen. The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the top right corner of each frame. Red and yellow banners at the bottom and top provide Hindi text. In the initial frames, the top text reads "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है" and the bottom ticker says "JDU कोटे से मंत्री बने विजेन्द्र यादव". As the scene progresses, the top banner changes to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and the bottom ticker updates to "BJP से डॉ. प्रे". The time "10:08 PM" is displayed in the bottom right corner.
